## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated.
- [ ] `pytest` passes locally.
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `## [Unreleased]`.
- [ ] No new top-level dependencies (or discussed in an issue first).
- [ ] If touching the IR wire protocol: version bump + migration note.
- [ ] If touching plugin trust / integrity: explicit threat-model note
      in the PR description.

## How to verify

```bash
pytest
# plus any specific commands a reviewer should run
```
